data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Above $100; Trump Hails 'Great Progress' In Iran Talks, Issues Threats
data.description: Futures saw an increase following President Trump's statements regarding a potential conflict with Iran, leading to a rise in oil prices exceeding $100. Despite this, the stock market showed a positive trend after enduring four consecutive weeks of losses. Investors are now looking forward to the upcoming Tesla delivery reports. Trump remains optimistic about the progress in talks with Iran while also issuing threats.

data.title: PrimeTech Launches to Scale AI-Driven Wall Framing
data.description: A recently established company named PrimeTech has been introduced as the successor to BamCore, aiming to revolutionize residential construction in North America. By merging BamCore's patented framing systems with decentralized fabrication methods, PrimeTech offers a unique solution for rapid, efficient, and eco-friendly building projects. The company is based in HINES, Ore., and their innovative approach is expected to significantly reduce labor requirements and carbon footprint. This announcement was made on March 30, 2026, and PrimeTech is set to bring about a transformative change in the construction industry in the region.

data.title: Baiya International Group Inc. Sets Sail, the Market Takes the Helm: The “Cryptocurrency Ark Plan” Begins with a Global Vote to Determine Its First Allocation Direction
data.description: Today, in Shenzhen, China, Baiya International Group Inc. (Nasdaq: BIYA), a leading human resource technology firm, introduced its Cryptocurrency Ark Plan. This innovative initiative includes a global voting mechanism to decide the allocation of digital assets in the company’s next phase. By combining market-driven choices with a disciplined approach, the Plan signifies a shift in asset allocation strategy. BIYA's cloud-based internet platform offers crowdsourcing recruitment and SaaS-enabled HR solutions.

data.title: Clean Energy Technologies Advances First Waste-to-Energy Deployment in Alberta Under LOI with Hoppy Power, Targeting Scalable Rollout
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CETY), a company specializing in clean energy solutions, revealed signing a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) with Hoppy Power Ltd. The agreement aims to explore and promote the use of CETY’s exclusive High Temperature Ablative Pyrolysis (HTAP ™) technology for waste-to-energy projects. This move signifies a step towards utilizing innovative solutions for converting waste and heat into power and fuels.

data.title: KALA BIO Delivers Industry-Leading AI Infrastructure: Bionic Intelligence Research Agent Now Live
data.description: A cutting-edge AI platform has successfully been implemented in live enterprise operations, offering secure, scalable, and autonomous research solutions to biotechnology and pharmaceutical companies worldwide. This next-generation agentic AI platform marks a significant advancement in the industry, providing unparalleled capabilities to organizations. The deployment of this platform signifies a shift towards innovative technologies to enhance research processes. Its ability to deliver secure and scalable solutions showcases its potential to revolutionize the way research is conducted in the biotechnology and pharmaceutical sectors globally.

data.title: Immix Biopharma Announces Enrollment Completion of BLA-Enabling Relapsed/Refractory AL Amyloidosis Trial NEXICART-2, and Upcoming Milestones
data.description: The enrollment for the trial to support the Biologic License Application (BLA) has been fully completed according to the previous announcement. The top-line results for NEXICART-2 are anticipated to be disclosed in the third quarter of 2026. This will be followed by the submission of the BLA and the scheduled commencement of commercial activities. The company has recently welcomed a new Chief Medical Officer, who previously held positions at Merck and Johnson & Johnson, to oversee the BLA submission process.

data.title: Companies Unveiling Autonomous Defense System Amid Surge Toward $43 Billion Global Market
data.description: A cutting-edge AI system has revolutionized military operations, allowing forces to detect, decide, and deploy with unmatched speed compared to conventional command structures. This system, implemented in New York on March 30, 2026, harnesses autonomous technology to enhance defense capabilities. Through this advancement, militaries can conduct missions swiftly and efficiently, showcasing a significant improvement in operational efficiency. The integration of AI has led to a remarkable evolution in how tasks are carried out, providing a strategic advantage for armed forces across the globe.

data.title: ONCOMATRYX Raises $67 Million to Foster the Clinical Development of Its Quantum ADCs in Spain
data.description: A Spanish biopharmaceutical company, ONCOMATRYX, focusing on Quantum ADCs against the tumor microenvironment, has secured $67 million in funding for the advancement of innovative candidates. The funding was primarily backed by institutional investors, with significant contributions from various sources: a $28 million strategic investment from the Spanish Government via Centro para el Desarrollo Tecnologico e Innovacion (CDTI), $18 million from Kutxa Fundazioa, and $12 million from the Basque region. This financial boost will support the company's clinical development efforts.

data.title: BTC price models suggest $40K-$50K as possible bottom despite recent bounce to $67K; onchain data supports bear market trend.
data.description: Bitcoin continues to struggle in a bear market even after experiencing a rebound to $67,000. Onchain metrics and models are indicating a potential bottom below $50,000, suggesting further downside for the cryptocurrency.
Investor reports ownership of 8.3% shares in Picton Property Income Limited.

data.title: Baxter Introduces the IV Verify Line Labeling System, an Automated Solution to Improve IV Labeling in Healthcare Settings
data.description: Illinois-based company Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) unveiled the IV Verify Line Labeling System at the 2026 American Organization for Nursing Leadership Conference. This automated solution aims to improve nursing workflows, save clinician time, and enhance medication safety at the bedside. The launch of this product follows a strategic partnership and exclusive distribution agreement. This technology is expected to make a significant impact in the healthcare industry.

data.title: Empery Digital Announces Update on Share Repurchase Program
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Empery Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: EMPD) provided an update on their share repurchase program. As of March 27, 2026, the company has bought back 23,630,147 shares of common stock from their $200 million program. The average price per share was $5.83, inclusive of fees and commissions. This action leaves the current outstanding shares at 32,428,307 after the repurchases.

data.title: Telekom Srbija Group Strengthens Its Presence in Germany with New MTEL Germany Store Opening in Offenbach
data.description: Telekom Srbija Group recently opened a new MTEL Germany store in Offenbach, solidifying its presence in Germany, a key growth market in Europe. The store offers a wide range of Telekom Srbija Group's products and services under the MTEL Germany brand, enhancing customer accessibility. This expansion aligns with the company's dedication to strengthening its international retail network. The new store in Offenbach serves as a modern space for customers to conveniently connect and explore the group's offerings, showcasing its commitment to long-term growth and expansion strategies.

data.title: Reaching Farther Than Ever: Rain Bird Golf Unveils a New Rotor That Inspires Larger, More Ambitious Course Designs
data.description: Today in AZUSA, California, Rain Bird Corporation's Golf division unveiled the latest addition to its irrigation lineup - the 952LT Long-Throw Block Rotor. Boasting the longest throw capability in the company's golf irrigation range, this new product can reach an impressive maximum radius of 115 feet. The 952LT is set to revolutionize golf course irrigation with its unmatched performance and precision.

data.title: dxFeed Introduces Spring Sale on Market Data Subscriptions -- Up to 64% Off Tools for Retail Traders
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 30, 2026, dxFeed introduced a special Spring Sale offering exclusive discounts on market data subscriptions, trading tools, and real-time data access for stocks, forex, and indices. This limited-time promotion provides an opportunity to access premium services at reduced prices. Take advantage of this offer to save on essential financial resources in the current market environment.
